name: Update eco news with invalid data -- @1.2
fullName: Update Eco News: Update eco news with invalid data

steps.name: When I send PUT request to update eco news with id 78 and {"id":"78","source":"source","shortInfo":"Upcoming environmental event","tags":["events"],"title":"Upcoming environmental event","content":"Full article text here","titleTranslation":{"content":"Environmental Event","languageCode":"en"},"textTranslation":{"content":"Event details and registration info","languageCode":"en"}}:
Update eco new with specified data

parameters.name: files
parameters.value: {'image': ('image.jpg', <_io.BufferedReader name='/tmp/tmpn9q0z8ia.jpg'>, 'image/jpeg'), 'updateEcoNewsDto': (None, '{"id": "78", "source": "source", "shortInfo": "Upcoming environmental event", "tags": ["events"], "title": "Upcoming environmental event", "content": "Full article text here", "titleTranslation": {"content": "Environmental Event", "languageCode": "en"}, "textTranslation": {"content": "Event details and registration info", "languageCode": "en"}}', 'application/json')}

parameters.name: data
parameters.value: {'id': '78', 'source': 'source', 'shortInfo': 'Upcoming environmental event', 'tags': ['events'], 'title': 'Upcoming environmental event', 'content': 'Full article text here', 'titleTranslation': {'content': 'Environmental Event', 'languageCode': 'en'}, 'textTranslation': {'content': 'Event details and registration info', 'languageCode': 'en'}}

steps.name: Then the response status code should be 404
And the response message should be Eco new doesn't exist by this id: 78

parameters.name: data
parameters.value: {"id":"78","source":"source","shortInfo":"Upcoming environmental event","tags":["events"],"title":"Upcoming environmental event","content":"Full article text here","titleTranslation":{"content":"Environmental Event","languageCode":"en"},"textTranslation":{"content":"Event details and registration info","languageCode":"en"}}

parameters.name: message
parameters.value: Eco new doesn't exist by this id: 78
